rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings with existing features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes; use implementation annexes for assignments
Only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions and eq/const for declarations
Component type annexes are for structural and behavioral assumptions; implementation annexes for bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
